# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
    component: data-jobs
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
        component: data-jobs
    spec:
      # Since pods don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API,
      # disable service account token mounting to reduce attack surface
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: batch-processor:1.0.0
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
          env:
            - name: PROCESSING_THREADS
              value: "4"
            - name: DATA_DIR
              value: "/data"
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - pgrep -f data-processor
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 60
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/ready
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 500Mi
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 5Gi
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 120
